performance_changes: hCaptcha JavaScript deferred until contact form nears viewport or receives interaction
Analytics loader reduced from three direct scripts to one lightweight configuration script
Analytics implementation loaded only when a valid Measurement ID exists and during idle time
Microsoft Bookings origin preconnected only after user intent
Unnecessary camera, microphone, geolocation, and clipboard iframe permissions removed
deployment_changes: Pages artifact upload explicitly includes hidden files
Hidden production files generated in _site rather than required in source uploads
Missing or invalid GA4 variable no longer fails deployment
Concurrent stale Pages builds are cancelled
Deployment artifact is allowlisted and excludes documentation and scripts
